description: An OAuth Client is a namespace-scoped client registration linked to an OAuth application.

ID.description: ID is the identifier of the object.
ID.title: ID

clientID.description: Client identifier used in OAuth requests.
clientID.title: clientID

clientSecret.description: Client secret associated with the client ID.
clientSecret.title: clientSecret

importHash.description: The hash of the structure used to compare with new import version.
importHash.title: importHash

importLabel.description: The user-defined import label that allows the system to group resources from the same import operation.
importLabel.title: importLabel

oauthApplicationID.description: Identifier of the referenced OAuth application.
oauthApplicationID.title: oauthApplicationID

oauthApplicationNamespace.description: Namespace of the referenced OAuth application.
oauthApplicationNamespace.title: oauthApplicationNamespace

redirectURIs.description: List of allowed redirect URIs for the client.
redirectURIs.title: redirectURIs

tokenEndpointAuthMethod.description: How the client authenticates to the token endpoint.
tokenEndpointAuthMethod.title: tokenEndpointAuthMethod

updateTime.description: Last update date of the object.
updateTime.title: updateTime

title: OAuthClient
